svg.title: Odylith benchmark family heatmap
svg.text: Grounding Benchmark Family Heatmap: where Odylith wins
These are published median family deltas from the Grounding Benchmark for Odylith on versus odylith_off (raw host CLI).
Families are ordered by Odylith's developer-first benchmark archetypes rather than token cost. Green means Odylith wins that
family. Prompt-bundle input deltas are tokens and packet time deltas are milliseconds; lower values are better for both.
Recall and validation favor higher values.
Green: Odylith better | Red: baseline better | Ordered by developer archetype
